runningSpeed.description: Running speeds in meters per second (wicketDistance = 22 yards = 20.12 meters)

decisionFactors.description: Factors affecting running decisions. Formula: errorProbabilityBase * (1 - combinedJudgment/40). At combinedJudgment=30 (average), errorProbability=2.4%.

riskAssessment.description: Time margins for different risk levels
